parsed.goal: Personal curiosity—demystifying the 'magic' of AI for a non-technical learner

modules.title: The AI's Alphabet: How Computers 'Read' Words
modules.description: Before an AI can answer your questions, it has to convert human language into something a machine can process. This module breaks down the very first step of the bottom-up journey: turning words into numbers and organizing them into a 'map of meaning.'

plan.goal: Explain how text is chopped into pieces and assigned mathematical locations so a computer can understand relationships between words without knowing what the words actually are.
concepts: Concept clustering (Why 'king' and 'queen' live in the same neighborhood)

modules.title: The Brain's Engine: How the Model Learns to 'Think'
modules.description: Now that we know how the AI reads, we need to understand how it was trained. This module covers the core mechanism behind the magic: a massive game of high-stakes autocomplete, guided by a revolutionary context-matching system.

plan.goal: Understand that an LLM is fundamentally predicting the next word, and explain how the 'Attention' mechanism helps it remember context to make accurate predictions.
sourceRefs: Phase 2: How It 'Understands' (The Magic of Scale)

modules.title: Hitting 'Send': From Chaos to Conversation
modules.description: You asked what exactly happens the second you hit send. This module walks through the inference process (the AI "cooking" its response) and explains why the AI sounds like a polite, helpful human rather than a chaotic robot.

plan.goal: Trace the exact sequence of events from submitting a prompt to receiving a response, and explain how human feedback shaped the AI's polite personality.
concepts: The Base Model vs. The Chat Model
sourceRefs: Bottom-Up Summary for a Beginner (The Chef Analogy)

modules.title: Demystifying the Magic: Does it Actually Understand?
modules.description: The final piece of the puzzle. AI can write poetry and debug code, which makes it feel incredibly human. This module explains the difference between human comprehension and the AI's 'statistical mirror,' wrapping up the demystification of the model.

plan.goal: Differentiate between human comprehension and AI's statistical pattern matching, and describe how scale leads to 'Emergent' abilities.
sourceRefs: Phase 3: Why It Feels So Valuable

modules.title: The AI's Alphabet: How Computers 'Read' Words
The Brain's Engine: How the Model Learns to 'Think'
Demystifying the Magic: Does it Actually Understand?
